zh.lifeSummary: 當Joyce Susan Webber於1620年4月9日出生在英國戴文可雷迪頓時，她的父親Edward Webber27歲，母親Tomazin Carpenter20歲。她於大約1640年與John B Peacock在美國康乃狄克州費艾費爾德史達科特結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於1670年在美國康乃狄克州費艾費爾德史達科特享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joyce Susan Webber于1620年4月9日出生在英国戴文可雷迪頓时，她的父亲Edward Webber27岁，母亲Tomazin Carpenter20岁。她于大约1640年与John B Peacock在美国康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。她去世于1670年在美国康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Webber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Webb
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

nameMeanings.name: Susan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Suzan
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Susanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Joyce Susan Webber was born on 9 April 1620, in Crediton, Devon, England, her father, Edward Webber, was 27 and her mother, Tomazin Carpenter, was 20. She married John B Peacock about 1640, in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died in 1670, in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 50.

ja.lifeSummary: Joyce Susan Webberが1620年4月9日にイギリスデボンクレディトンで生まれた時，父Edward Webberは27歳，母Tomazin Carpenterは20歳であった。約1640年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ファイルフィールドストラトフォードでJohn B Peacockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1670年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ファイルフィールドストラトフォードで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joyce Susan Webber(이)가 1620년 4월 9일 영국 데폰 크레딧에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Webber(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Tomazin Carpenter(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1640년 미국 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드에서 John B Peacock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1670년 미국 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce Susan Webber nasceu em 9 de abril de 1620, em Crediton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Webber, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Tomazin Carpenter, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John B Peacock aproximadamente 1640, em Stratford, Fairfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1670, em Stratford, Fairfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 50 anos.

ru.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.St Botolph's Church, Helpston, Cambridge: ст ботолф'с чурч, хелпстон, камбриджешир, Англия
ru.Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony,: милфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joyce Susan Webber родилась 9 апреля 1620 г. в местности кредитон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Webber было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Tomazin Carpenter, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John B Peacock около 1640 г. в местности стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1670 г. в местности стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joyce Susan Webber nació el 9 de abril de 1620, en Crediton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Webber, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Tomazin Carpenter, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John B Peacock aproximadamente 1640, en Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió en 1670, en Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 50 años.
